name: Sambal Fried Green Chilli (Goreng Sambal Lada
recipeIngredient: 1 Tin anchovy fillets in olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the green chillies into a paste using a mortar or blend with 2 tablespoons of water for 20 seconds on medium speed.
2. Stir-fry onions in hot oil until golden.
3. Add the chili paste and salt, stirring to combine.
4. Reduce heat and let simmer for 2 minutes.
5. Add diced tomatoes, chopped anchovies, and remaining olive oil.
6. Stir gently and continue to simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. The long cooking time removes the heat from the chillies and allows the flavors to meld together.
7. This recipe can also be made using red chillies and ripe tomatoes instead of green ones.
8. Store in the refrigerator for up to one week.
